purpose: Declare how abyss-machine public seed contracts, release bundles, runtime artifacts, local evidence, and public media exports are fingerprinted, attested, or signed without publishing private host state.

abi_signature.meaning: A deterministic digest over tracked source files that define a public contract surface. It is a compatibility signal for agents and canaries, not a cryptographic release signature.

lineage_mapping.entity: the generated fact, report, trace, snapshot, session packet, or host evidence object
lineage_mapping.activity: the command, timer, service, or agent action that produced it
lineage_mapping.agent: the local tool, service, human operator, or agent session responsible for the activity

consumer_checks: schema and artifact_class match the expected local evidence contract
schema_ref resolves to the public local provenance packet schema
authority_ref resolves to /etc/abyss-machine or the nearest local route card
contract_version matches the local packet schema and policy contract expected by the consumer
producer_command or service identity is present
privacy_boundary forbids public publication unless reviewed
content_identity is present before cleanup, promotion, or export decisions
verification names the local validator or restore/probe check used by the consumer
promotion_controls: public export requires privacy review and a new public artifact identity
release signing requires conversion to a publishable artifact class
cleanup decisions require restore, usage, or quarantine evidence rather than age or path alone

consumer_checks: verify the contract ABI generated/contract_abi_signatures.min.json is current before release
match the artifact class ABI epoch and source tree hash against the expected contract surface
parse the SBOM sidecar as SPDX or CycloneDX before trusting it
verify the SBOM artifact digest or component identity matches the release artifact
parse the ML-BOM sidecar as CycloneDX before trusting an AI bundle
verify model, dataset, conversion, framework config, and source digests are present for distributed AI artifacts
verify the SLSA/in-toto attestation subject digest matches the release artifact
verify predicateType, builder identity, canonical source, buildType, and expected externalParameters before install
verify the Sigstore/Cosign signature or bundle against the release artifact digest
verify signer identity, issuer or key root, and required annotations before trusting a release asset
verify the C2PA manifest or sidecar for public media/content exports
verify claim signature, active asset binding, and privacy review route before publication

public_source_seed.description: The public repository seed: source, templates, manifests, schemas, validators, tests, and docs that can be published safely.

identity.producer: tracked source edits plus deterministic generated read models
identity.consumer_expectation: agents and canaries verify public boundary, manifest integrity, and contract ABI freshness before consuming the seed
identity.privacy_boundary: public; must not include live host facts, private captures, secrets, caches, models, or local indexes
identity.content_identity: git tree plus generated contract ABI sha256-tree-v1

sbom.trigger: only when a package or release bundle is produced

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: minimal release provenance when a release artifact is built

sigstore_cosign.trigger: release assets or OCI artifacts only

c2pa.trigger: not a media/content credential artifact

bootstrap_install_bundle.description: Rendered or packaged bootstrap/install material derived from the public seed.

identity.producer: bootstrap scripts and release packaging from tracked public seed inputs
identity.consumer_expectation: install consumers verify ABI epoch, bootstrap profile, SBOM, SLSA/in-toto provenance, and release signature when distributed
identity.privacy_boundary: public-derived; rendered host-local values stay outside the repo
identity.content_identity: release artifact digest plus ABI source tree hash

sbom.trigger: when distributed as wheel, archive, installer, or release bundle

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: minimal release provenance for published install artifacts

sigstore_cosign.trigger: published release assets

c2pa.trigger: not media

runtime_or_container_artifact.description: Install/runtime/container deliverables for host-managed services or deployable helpers.

identity.producer: runtime packaging or container build from tracked runtime helpers and host policy templates
identity.consumer_expectation: runtime consumers verify ABI epoch, SBOM, build/install provenance, signer/builder identity, and distribution digest
identity.privacy_boundary: publishable only after excluding local model caches, compile blobs, private benchmarks, and /srv runtime state
identity.content_identity: artifact digest plus release sidecar digests

sbom.trigger: runtime, container, deployable bundle, or packaged helper

ml_bom.trigger: use ai_model_or_runtime_bundle when model weights, datasets, conversion metadata, or AI framework config are included

slsa_in_toto.trigger: build or install provenance for published artifacts

sigstore_cosign.trigger: OCI images, release bundles, and published blobs

c2pa.trigger: not media

ai_model_or_runtime_bundle.description: Published AI model, dataset, conversion, or framework-config bundle owned by the host-machine runtime route.

identity.producer: model/runtime download, conversion, packaging, or release process from tracked host AI runtime routes
identity.consumer_expectation: AI runtime consumers verify ABI epoch, ML-BOM, SBOM when software is bundled, SLSA/in-toto provenance, signer identity, and model/source digests
identity.privacy_boundary: publishable only after excluding local prompts, private traces, benchmark scratch, compile caches, and host-specific /srv state
identity.content_identity: model/runtime bundle digest plus model, dataset, conversion, and framework-config identities

sbom.trigger: when software or runtime dependencies are bundled

ml_bom.trigger: model, dataset, conversion metadata, or AI framework config is distributed

slsa_in_toto.trigger: published AI model/runtime bundle

sigstore_cosign.trigger: published release asset, OCI artifact, bundle, or blob

c2pa.trigger: not public media

browser_extension_package.description: Uploadable browser extension source zip or signed package for typed-text intake.

identity.producer: extension packaging from tracked typed-text intake source
identity.consumer_expectation: extension consumers verify ABI epoch, package provenance, extension-store signing boundary, and optional detached release signature
identity.privacy_boundary: package contains code only; typed text, browser captures, and local histories stay private
identity.content_identity: zip/xpi digest plus ABI source tree hash

sbom.trigger: lite dependency inventory if bundled third-party code appears

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: package provenance for published source zip or xpi

sigstore_cosign.trigger: optional detached release-asset signature; Mozilla signing remains separate

c2pa.trigger: not media

aoa_skills_release_manifest.description: Generated aoa-skills portable export release manifest consumed as a repo-local release contract.

identity.producer: aoa-skills release manifest builder from generated export surfaces, bundle indexes, install profiles, and release identity
identity.consumer_expectation: consumers verify the aoa-skills generated release manifest digest, artifact identity, schema, generated-file digests, local release provenance, skill bundle revisions, and install profile revisions before trusting a portable export handoff
identity.privacy_boundary: public-safe generated export metadata and digests only; no secrets, host runtime state, downstream adoption truth, or private workspace evidence
identity.content_identity: generated/release_manifest.json digest plus artifact_identity from the owning aoa-skills repository

sbom.trigger: lite dependency inventory only when aoa-skills is packaged as a distribution artifact

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: minimal bundle provenance is carried until aoa-skills publishes an external release artifact

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until release assets are signed

c2pa.trigger: not public media

aoa_session_memory_portable_bundle.description: Clean .aoa / aoa-session-memory portable kernel export bundle consumed by workspaces and agents as installable session-memory infrastructure.

identity.producer: aoa-session-memory export-bundle from portable kernel source, with clean export excluding raw sessions and host-local runtime evidence by default
identity.consumer_expectation: workspace and agent installers verify portable bundle digests, ABI identity, SBOM-lite source inventory, SLSA/in-toto export provenance, portable audit readiness, and trust-gate allow/warn verdict before install or use; raw .aoa evidence never becomes trust authority
identity.privacy_boundary: public-safe portable kernel, route docs, schemas, scripts, skills, hook examples, tests, and compact export metadata only; no raw transcripts, session archives, hook receipts, diagnostics payloads, search databases, graph sidecars, secrets, or private workspace evidence
identity.content_identity: clean portable export bundle digest plus aoa-session-memory portable kernel subject inventory

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite subject inventory for portable session-memory kernel bundles consumed by workspaces, agents, or update clients

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: clean portable session-memory kernel export bundles are installed, updated, or published

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required only when aoa-session-memory publishes signed release assets or external release bundles

c2pa.trigger: not public media; raw sessions, PDFs, or visualizations require their own reviewed artifact class

role_contract_registry.description: Generated aoa-agents public role-contract registry bundle derived from source-authored role profiles.

identity.producer: aoa-agents published-surface builder from source-authored role profiles and agent registry schema
identity.consumer_expectation: agent-layer consumers verify generated role registry digests, ABI identity, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, build_published_surfaces parity, and validate_agents before using role identity orientation; do not treat the registry as skill, proof, memory, routing, playbook, or runtime authority
identity.privacy_boundary: public source-authored agent-layer metadata only; no private prompts, session transcripts, secrets, live runtime state, hidden operator traces, or role authority beyond aoa-agents source objects
identity.content_identity: generated/agent_registry.min.json digest plus repo-local aoa-agents artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite only when aoa-agents is packaged as a distribution or release bundle with dependency inventory

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: generated role registry bundle artifacts are exported or prepared for release

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until aoa-agents publishes signed release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

source_owned_kag_export_capsule.description: Generated aoa-techniques public source-owned KAG export capsule derived from authored technique bundles.

identity.producer: aoa-techniques KAG export builder from source-authored technique bundles and source-lift relation metadata
identity.consumer_expectation: KAG consumers verify generated export digests, ABI identity, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, build_kag_export parity, validate_repo, and source-lift boundary checks before using this as donor orientation; authored TECHNIQUE.md bundles remain stronger than the capsule
identity.privacy_boundary: public technique metadata and source refs only; no private project residue, hidden transcripts, source payload bodies, secrets, machine-local runtime state, or KAG substrate authority
identity.content_identity: generated/kag_export.min.json digest plus repo-local aoa-techniques artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite only when aoa-techniques is packaged as a distribution or release bundle with dependency inventory

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: generated KAG export capsule artifacts are exported or prepared for release

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until aoa-techniques publishes signed release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

derived_kag_registry_readmodel_bundle.description: Generated aoa-kag public registry readmodel bundle derived from the source-authored KAG registry manifest.

identity.producer: aoa-kag registry generator from manifests/kag_registry.json and the KAG registry schema
identity.consumer_expectation: KAG consumers verify generated registry digests, ABI identity, SBOM-lite subject inventory, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, validate_kag, generated parity, and source-owner boundaries before using registry orientation; source repositories remain stronger than the registry
identity.privacy_boundary: public KAG surface refs and compact summaries only; no private session payloads, memo payload bodies, source corpus bodies, secrets, live runtime state, or local host evidence
identity.content_identity: generated/kag_registry.min.json digest plus repo-local aoa-kag artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite subject inventory for generated KAG registry readmodel bundles consumed by machine and agent surfaces

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: generated KAG registry readmodel bundle artifacts are exported or prepared for release

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until aoa-kag publishes signed release assets or external release bundles

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

derived_memory_object_readmodel_family.description: Generated aoa-memo public memory-object readmodel family derived from reviewed corpus objects and curated teaching fixtures.

identity.producer: aoa-memo memory-object surface generator from reviewed corpus objects, curated generated-surface examples, and memory-object schemas
identity.consumer_expectation: memory consumers verify generated memory-object readmodel digests, ABI identity, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, generate_memory_object_surfaces --check, validate_memory_object_surfaces, and memory-is-not-proof boundaries before using recall readmodels
identity.privacy_boundary: public reviewed corpus and teaching fixture refs only; no private session payloads, unreviewed local-port candidates, secrets, live access-plane state, or proof/identity claims
identity.content_identity: generated memory-object catalog, compact catalog, capsules, and sections digests plus repo-local aoa-memo artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite only when aoa-memo memory surfaces are packaged as a distribution or release bundle with dependency inventory

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: generated memory-object readmodel family artifacts are exported or prepared for release

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until aoa-memo publishes signed release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

thin_routing_readmodel_bundle.description: Generated aoa-routing thin router/readmodel bundle derived from source-owned route schemas, generated route catalogs, and sibling next-hop references.

identity.producer: aoa-routing router builder from routing schemas, bounded mechanics, and sibling generated catalogs referenced by path
identity.consumer_expectation: routing consumers verify generated router digests, ABI identity, SBOM-lite subject inventory, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, build_router --check, validate_router, and source-owned next-hop refs before dispatch; the router remains navigation metadata and not owner truth
identity.privacy_boundary: public routing refs and compact generated navigation summaries only; no private payloads, secrets, live runtime state, copied owner corpora, or sibling source authority
identity.content_identity: generated aoa router, route hints, recommended paths, and routing schemas digests plus repo-local aoa-routing artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite subject inventory for generated routing readmodel bundles consumed by machine routers and agents

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: generated routing readmodel bundle artifacts are exported or prepared for release

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until aoa-routing publishes signed release assets or external release bundles

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

playbook_registry_bundle.description: Source-authored aoa-playbooks registry and playbook-owned generated readout bundle for scenario/composition consumers.

identity.producer: aoa-playbooks source-authored registry plus deterministic playbook-owned surface generators
identity.consumer_expectation: playbook consumers verify registry digests, ABI identity, SLSA/in-toto generation provenance, validate_playbooks, generated surface parity, and owner boundaries before using playbook scenario metadata
identity.privacy_boundary: public playbook metadata and generated playbook-owned composition/readout refs only; no private run logs, secrets, live runtime state, memo truth, proof verdicts, or routing authority
identity.content_identity: generated playbook registry and playbook-owned composition, activation, review, and federation readout digests plus repo-local aoa-playbooks artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite only when aoa-playbooks is packaged as a distribution or release bundle with dependency inventory

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: playbook registry/readout bundle artifacts are exported or prepared for release

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not required until aoa-playbooks publishes signed release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

aoa_sdk_python_distribution.description: Built aoa-sdk Python wheel and sdist distribution artifacts consumed as package release outputs.

identity.producer: aoa-sdk Python build backend from tracked SDK source and package metadata
identity.consumer_expectation: package consumers verify wheel/sdist digests, ABI identity, SBOM package/dependency inventory, and SLSA/in-toto provenance before trusting built SDK distributions
identity.privacy_boundary: public package artifacts only; no host runtime state, private workspace evidence, session traces, caches, or local /srv data
identity.content_identity: wheel and sdist digests plus repo-local aoa-sdk artifact identity manifest

sbom.trigger: wheel or sdist distribution artifacts are built

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: wheel or sdist distribution artifacts are built

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required when aoa-sdk publishes signed GitHub Release, PyPI, blob, or other release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media

abyss_stack_runtime_config_bundle.description: Public-safe rendered abyss-stack runtime configuration bundles generated from tracked compose modules, profiles, presets, and config projection rules.

identity.producer: abyss-stack config rendering scripts from tracked compose modules and public-safe runtime route inputs
identity.consumer_expectation: runtime consumers verify rendered config digests, ABI identity, SBOM subject inventory, and SLSA/in-toto render provenance before trusting deployable config bundles
identity.privacy_boundary: public-safe rendered runtime config only; no Secrets, Logs, Models, stack.env values, private host captures, local databases, or deployed /srv mutable state
identity.content_identity: rendered runtime config digests plus repo-local abyss-stack artifact identity manifest

sbom.trigger: rendered runtime config bundle artifacts are built

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle with model weights

slsa_in_toto.trigger: rendered runtime config bundle artifacts are built

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required when abyss-stack publishes OCI images, signed release bundles, or external release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media

aoa_evals_generated_report_index_bundle.description: Generated aoa-evals public report/result index bundle derived from source eval bundles, bundle-local reports, and mechanic-owned report readouts.

identity.producer: aoa-evals generated report-index builder from source proof bundles, bundle-local reports, and mechanic-owned report readouts
identity.consumer_expectation: proof consumers verify generated report-index digests, ABI identity, SBOM-lite subject inventory, and SLSA/in-toto generation provenance before trusting report/result lookup bundles
identity.privacy_boundary: public-safe generated proof reader only; no private datasets, hidden telemetry, raw operator traces, secret-bearing fixtures, or unreviewed runtime evidence
identity.content_identity: generated report-index digest plus repo-local aoa-evals artifact identity manifest

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite subject inventory for generated report/result index bundles

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: generated report/result index bundle artifacts are built

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required only when aoa-evals publishes signed reports, release bundles, or external release assets

c2pa.trigger: required only for public PDF/media reports, not JSON report indexes

derived_observability_readmodel_catalog.description: Generated aoa-stats public summary-surface catalog bundle derived from source-owned receipts, bounded examples, and stats schemas.

identity.producer: aoa-stats summary-surface catalog builder from source-owned receipts, bounded examples, schema contracts, and derived-only stats posture
identity.consumer_expectation: stats consumers verify generated catalog digests, ABI identity, SBOM-lite subject inventory, build_views --check, validate_repo, and surface-strength boundaries before using observability readmodels
identity.privacy_boundary: public derived summary refs only; no raw private receipts, session captures, owner payload bodies, runtime-local evidence, or owner-truth claims
identity.content_identity: generated summary surface catalog digest plus repo-local aoa-stats artifact identity

sbom.trigger: SBOM-lite subject inventory for generated observability readmodel catalogs

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: required later only when generated stats readmodels are packaged as an external release/export bundle

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required later only when aoa-stats publishes signed release bundles or external release assets

c2pa.trigger: not public media; C2PA applies only to public PDF/media/content exports

tree_of_sophia_generated_readmodel_bundl.description: Generated Tree-of-Sophia public JSON readmodel bundle for downstream orientation surfaces that remain subordinate to authored ToS meaning.

identity.producer: Tree-of-Sophia generated readmodel builders from authored ToS, public compatibility, and derived export route surfaces
identity.consumer_expectation: downstream consumers verify generated readmodel digests, ABI identity, schema/export validators, and the source-first boundary before trusting orientation exports
identity.privacy_boundary: public-safe generated JSON readmodels only; no private host/runtime/session evidence, unreviewed source expansion, local graph cache, or media credential material
identity.content_identity: root_entry_map, KAG export, and ToS corpus index digests plus repo-local Tree-of-Sophia artifact identity

sbom.trigger: not a software distribution artifact; add SBOM only if ToS publishes a packaged software or release bundle with dependency inventory

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: required only when generated ToS readmodels are packaged as an external release/export bundle

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required only when ToS publishes signed release assets or release bundles

c2pa.trigger: use public_media_export for public PDFs, visualizations, images, or media/content credential exports; not JSON readmodels

dionysus_seed_route_readmodel_bundle.description: Generated Dionysus public seed route/readmodel bundle for low-context seed navigation while preserving authored seed ownership boundaries.

identity.producer: Dionysus seed route map builder from seed registry, planting protocol, generated quest surfaces, and seed route validators
identity.consumer_expectation: seed consumers verify generated route-map digests, ABI identity, schema/seed-surface validators, and the archive/transport boundary before trusting navigation exports
identity.privacy_boundary: public-safe generated seed navigation only; no private host/runtime/session evidence, unpublished owner evidence, seed-pack media credentials, or canonical seed meaning
identity.content_identity: generated seed route map digest plus repo-local Dionysus artifact identity

sbom.trigger: not a software distribution artifact; add SBOM only if Dionysus publishes a packaged software or release bundle with dependency inventory

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: required only when Dionysus generated route/readmodel surfaces are packaged as an external release/export or planting artifact bundle

sigstore_cosign.trigger: required only when Dionysus publishes signed release assets or release bundles

c2pa.trigger: use public_media_export or a future Dionysus seed-pack credential class for public seed packs, PDFs, media, docs, or content credentials; not JSON route readmodels

host_local_evidence.description: Private local reports, histories, snapshots, traces, typed events, nervous captures, and host facts created on an installed machine.

identity.producer: installed abyss-machine commands, timers, services, probes, or local agent sessions
identity.consumer_expectation: local agents verify the local provenance packet, route card, privacy boundary, content identity, and subsystem validator before acting on evidence
identity.privacy_boundary: private host evidence; not public repo content and not release-signed by default
identity.content_identity: local packet path, sha256 or tree_hash, size, mtime, and producer refs

abi_signature.trigger: host-local evidence uses local provenance packets rather than public ABI signatures

local_provenance.trigger: local evidence must keep source, command, time, host route, privacy boundary, and content identity when promoted into /var/lib

sbom.trigger: not a software distribution artifact

ml_bom.trigger: local model caches use local provenance until converted to a publishable AI model/runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: not published by default

sigstore_cosign.trigger: not published by default

c2pa.trigger: private evidence is not public media

public_media_export.description: Public PDFs, visualizations, images, or content exports produced from host-machine material after privacy review.

identity.producer: reviewed export process from public-safe source or privacy-reviewed host material
identity.consumer_expectation: content consumers verify C2PA manifest and, when bundled for release, release asset digest or signature
identity.privacy_boundary: public only after review; private host evidence keeps its local provenance and does not become public automatically
identity.content_identity: media digest plus C2PA manifest or sidecar

sbom.trigger: not software

ml_bom.trigger: not an AI model, dataset, or runtime bundle

slsa_in_toto.trigger: only if released inside a generated export bundle

sigstore_cosign.trigger: optional release bundle signature

c2pa.trigger: public media/content export

release_artifact_rules.external_signing_note: Mozilla extension signing is separate from Sigstore/Cosign release asset signing.

implementation_order: validate this policy in source-fast CI
publish ABI signatures as a deterministic generated read model
require local provenance packets for promoted host-local evidence
add release-time SBOM and minimal SLSA/in-toto provenance for built artifacts
add ML-BOM when AI model/runtime bundles are distributed
add Sigstore/Cosign only when release assets, blobs, or OCI artifacts exist
add C2PA only for public media/content exports
verify updateable/installable artifacts through the OS Abyss TUF-style update lane before update-client consumption

tuf.required_when: artifact is consumed by update_client, installer auto-update, package updater, runtime updater, or browser/tool update route
client_checks: metadata version is monotonic against previous trusted state
snapshot_version is monotonic against previous trusted state
timestamp_version is monotonic against previous trusted state
unchanged metadata cannot exceed max_freeze_seconds since previous trusted state
artifact trust-gate must still allow or warn for the target artifact before consumption
tuf.claim_limit: This is the OS Abyss v1 TUF-style update metadata gate; it does not yet define delegated root/targets/snapshot/timestamp keys or publish a full external TUF repository.

scitt.trigger: signed statement federation exists across OS Abyss issuers or an external transparency service is introduced
scitt.required_when: external relying parties require append-only transparency receipts for OS Abyss signed statements
scitt.claim_limit: SCITT is an integration point for external accountability; local host trust gates and release attestations remain v1 authority until that service exists.

tuf.trigger: full external TUF repository, delegated signing keys, or distribution channel metadata exists
tuf.reason: OS Abyss v1 has a TUF-style update metadata gate, but no external delegated TUF repository or key ceremony is declared yet

scitt.trigger: signed statement federation exists across OS Abyss issuers
scitt.reason: local and release attestations do not yet require a federated transparency receipt plane
